      <frame id="1:95" name="Heading 2" x="0" y="0" width="611" height="106">
        <text id="1:96" name="Why Bodhi School of Yoga?" x="0" y="0" width="611" height="106" />
      </frame>
      <frame id="1:97" name="Container" x="0" y="124.80000305175781" width="611" height="222.625">
        <text id="1:98" name="Founded in 2014 by Acharya Ashok, Bodhi School of Yoga was created with a simple yet powerful vision: to help people reconnect with themselves through yoga, wellness, and inner awareness. Over the years, Bodhi has evolved into more than a yoga school. It is a space where individuals cultivate balance, clarity, and deeper well-being, whether for personal transformation or as a meaningful path to becoming a yoga teacher. At the heart of the mission is the empowerment of women through yoga. " x="0" y="0" width="611" height="222" />
      </frame>

    <frame id="1:558" name="Frame 1171281840" x="240" y="5479" width="1441" height="499">
      <frame id="1:559" name="Frame 1171281037" x="481.5" y="0" width="478" height="76">
        <text id="1:560" name="A Path to Wellness" x="162.5" y="0" width="153" height="17" />
        <text id="1:561" name="What our clients say" x="0" y="23" width="478" height="53" />
      </frame>
      <frame id="1:562" name="Frame 1171281839" x="0" y="124" width="1441" height="375">
        <frame id="1:563" name="Group 1171281831" x="0" y="0" width="457" height="375">
          <rounded-rectangle id="1:564" name="Rectangle 161124056" x="0" y="0" width="457" height="375" />
          <frame id="1:565" name="Frame 1171281050" x="6" y="30" width="443" height="312">
            <ellipse id="1:566" name="Ellipse 18" x="22" y="5.625" width="109" height="109" />
            <frame id="1:567" name="HorizontalBorder" x="22" y="124.625" width="399" height="181.75">
              <frame id="1:568" name="Blockquote" x="0" y="23.030000686645508" width="399" height="119.72000122070312">
                <text id="1:569" name="“I came in to lose weight. I left able to teach a class — and a calmer person at home. The training is honest, and that's rare.”" x="0" y="0" width="399" height="119" />
              </frame>
              <frame id="1:570" name="Cite" x="0" y="160.75" width="399" height="21">
                <text id="1:571" name="— Aanya, TTC Cohort 11. Now teaching in Goa." x="0" y="0" width="297" height="21" />
              </frame>
            </frame>
          </frame>
        </frame>
        <frame id="1:572" name="Group 1171281830" x="492" y="0" width="457" height="375">
          <rounded-rectangle id="1:573" name="Rectangle 161124057" x="492" y="0" width="457" height="375" />
          <text id="1:574" name="”" x="837" y="51" width="71" height="65" />
          <frame id="1:575" name="Frame 1171281051" x="492" y="30" width="443" height="312">
            <ellipse id="1:576" name="Ellipse 18" x="22" y="5.625" width="109" height="109" />
            <frame id="1:577" name="HorizontalBorder" x="22" y="124.625" width="399" height="181.75">
              <frame id="1:578" name="Blockquote" x="0" y="23.030000686645508" width="399" height="119.72000122070312">
                <text id="1:579" name="“The back pain workshop did more in two days than two years of physiotherapy. I've recommended Bodhi to everyone I know.”" x="0" y="0" width="399" height="119" />
              </frame>
              <frame id="1:580" name="Cite" x="0" y="160.75" width="399" height="21">
                <text id="1:581" name="— Ravi, workshop participant" x="0" y="0" width="188" height="21" />
              </frame>
            </frame>
          </frame>
        </frame>
        <frame id="1:582" name="Group 1171281829" x="984" y="0" width="457" height="375">
          <rounded-rectangle id="1:583" name="Rectangle 161124058" x="984" y="0" width="457" height="375" />
          <ellipse id="1:584" name="Ellipse 18" x="1013" y="44" width="109" height="109" />
          <frame id="1:585" name="Blockquote" x="1013" y="187.02978515625" width="399" height="119.72000122070312">
            <text id="1:586" name="“I practice with Bodhi online from Berlin. Six in the morning, India time. It's the most consistent thing in my week.”" x="0" y="0" width="399" height="119" />
          </frame>
          <frame id="1:587" name="Cite" x="1013" y="324.75" width="399" height="21">
            <text id="1:588" name="— Lena, online student, 2 years" x="0" y="0" width="203" height="21" />
          </frame>
          <text id="1:589" name="”" x="1332" y="55" width="71" height="65" />
        </frame>
      </frame>
    </frame>
    <text id="1:590" name="”" x="597" y="5656" width="71" height="65" />
  </frame>
